subject: Project Management
title: Kanban in Healthcare
description: A quick win: understand Kanban in Healthcare.

hook.text: Emergency rooms used Kanban boards to track patients from triage to treatment to discharge.

buildup.text: Visual boards showed patient flow in real time — bottlenecks in labs and imaging became obvious.

discovery.text: One hospital reduced ER wait times by 30% after implementing visual flow management.

twist.text: Doctors initially resisted — they didn't want factory methods in medicine. Results changed minds.

climax.text: Kanban in healthcare proves that flow thinking saves lives, not just money.

punchline.text: A factory system saves lives in hospitals.

quiz.question: How did Kanban improve emergency room performance?
options: Visual boards exposed bottlenecks and reduced wait times by 30%
It eliminated the need for triage
It replaced all electronic medical records
